case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. GABRIELA GONZALEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, GABRIELA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, GABRIELA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1430 GATEVIEW COURT, UNIT D, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94130, SAN FRANCISCO, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
